title: Dashboard Calendar on Mobile - Not Showing Subitems
excerpt:
Hi

posts.author: athena (athena nguy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I am trying to utilise sub items for my team, on my calendar dashboard the sub item and main card do appear (pc) but on mobile they are both invisible and can only be viewed from the main table. Is there anyway to make it more user friendly for mobile users?

I have refreshed several times and it is the same result, pc is fine but mobile view is not there.

Thanks
